full_article:
KATHMANDU: Stay updated with Nepal News’ evening briefing, bringing you the day’s most important developments from Nepal and across the globe. From politics and economy to sports, entertainment, and culture, we deliver a concise roundup of the top news you need to know.

Prime Minister Warns Against Election Boycott Extortion

Prime Minister Sushila Karki expressed serious concerns regarding election security during a meeting with officials in Butwal today. She directed security agencies to remain vigilant against small groups who, unable to contest fairly, use boycott threats to extort money from the public and maintain their political existence. The leader also highlighted potential natural challenges, such as snow in Rukum Purba and the upcoming Holi festival, which could impact peace. Additionally, she noted that recent incidents of burning party flags in the Terai region signal heightened competition that could lead to further violent clashes between rival factions.

EC Completes Ballot Paper Delivery Ahead of March 5 Elections

The Election Commission (EC) has delivered ballot papers and materials to Sudurpaschim, Karnali, and Koshi provinces, with transport to other provinces ongoing. Janak Shiksha Samagri Kendra Limited completed printing on February 16, producing 20.3 million first-past-the-post and 20.83 million proportional representation ballots. Nepal’s 18.9 million eligible voters will elect the 275-member lower house, 165 via FPTP and 110 through proportional representation. Delivery to all 77 districts is expected within 10 days. All 51 other election materials have been transported. The polls are set for March 5, less than two weeks away.

Curfew Imposed in Gaur After Renewed Clashes Between Two Communities

The District Administration Office, Rautahat, has imposed an indefinite curfew in Gaur, the district headquarters, from 1 PM today following renewed clashes between two communities. The decision was taken by the District Security Committee after violence resumed in Gaur Municipality 6, Sabagadh, despite a six-point agreement reached Friday evening. Stone pelting began around 9 AM Saturday. The curfew covers areas from Mudbalwa Gate in the east to Lalbakeya Embankment in the west, Bam Canal in the north, and Gaur Customs Office Gate in the south. Chief District Officer Dinesh Sagar Bhusal said movement, gatherings, meetings, processions, and demonstrations are strictly prohibited, with violators subject to legal action. Clashes have been reported in Wards 4, 5, and 6. Protesters allegedly set fire to vehicles and vandalized houses, and some individuals sustained minor injuries. Police fired warning shots and used tear gas to control the situation. Hundreds of personnel from Nepal Police and Armed Police Force Nepal have been deployed. Superintendent of Police Sitaram Rijal and Armed Police Superintendent Ram Hari Adhikari are at the site overseeing security operations.

Police Clash with Activists at Congress Election Rally

Police resorted to a baton charge in Bhokraha Narsingh Rural Municipality-4, Sunsari, on Saturday following a clash during a Nepali Congress event. The violence erupted in Sunsari Constituency 4 when supporters of candidate Gyanendra Karki encountered youth activists from the Rastriya Swatantra Party. According to Deputy Superintendent of Police Keshav Thebe, authorities intervened to disperse members of the Tarun Dal and opposing party workers as the situation turned volatile. While no major injuries were reported, the domestic nation’s security forces remained on high alert. Police confirmed that the situation in the area has since been brought under control.

Police Arrest Individual for Burning Political Party Flag

The Saptari District Police arrested a 25-year-old man for allegedly burning a political flag in Mahadeva Rural Municipality-5 on Saturday. According to Deputy Superintendent of Police Damber Bahadur Puri, the suspect, identified as Harinarayan Mandal, removed a CPN (UML) flag that was hung on a rope for election campaigning at Bhagwatpur Chowk and set it on fire. The individual, reportedly a member of the “Election Police” volunteer group, was taken into custody immediately following the incident. Authorities have initiated a formal investigation to determine the motive behind the arson as election tensions rise in the district.

13 Arrested Following Vehicle Arson Attack in Banepa

The Kavre Police arrested 13 individuals for their alleged involvement in setting fire to a tipper truck in Banepa. The incident occurred after a tipper fatally struck 30-year-old scooter driver Oman Pradhan on February 18. Following the tragedy, a mob engaged in stone-pelting and arson, destroying the vehicle. Among those detained are Bidur Budhathoki, Bikash Rai, and Shyam Manandhar. A local court granted authorities permission to keep the suspects in custody for seven days to facilitate further investigation. Police are currently reviewing surveillance and witness accounts to identify additional participants involved in the localized unrest.

60 Tiger Tracking Cameras Disappeared in Chitwan-Parsa

During a recent tiger census in the Chitwan and Parsa National Park complex, 60 out of 1,780 deployed cameras went missing. Information Officer Abinash Thapa of the Chitwan National Park Magar reported on Thursday that an additional 25 cameras were found damaged. The census, which utilized 958 grids over several weeks, concluded this Thursday. Despite the equipment loss, authorities completed the monitoring across two square kilometer sections per grid. The last census in 2022 recorded 355 adult tigers in the domestic nation, with 128 in Chitwan and 41 in Parsa. Data from the new count is currently being processed for official publication later this year.

Dhankuta Polling Center to Be Managed by Female Authorities

In a notable move toward gender inclusivity, the Office of the Chief Election Officer in Dhankuta announced that an all-female staff will manage a specific polling center for the March 5 election. The center, located at the Multipurpose Community Building Eye Hospital in Dhankuta Municipality-6, will be led by Polling Officer Indira Khadka Budhathoki. Chief Election Officer Harish Chandra Ingnum stated that while most of the 166 centers in the district will have mixed staff, this particular site will feature an all-women team of six personnel. Across the domestic nation’s district, a total of 996 employees are currently being deployed for election duties.

Army Delivers Election Supplies to Humla

Essential election materials arrived in the remote district of Humla on Saturday via a Nepal Army Sky Truck. District Election Officer Bhim Bahadur Rokaya confirmed the delivery of ballot boxes, security seals, indelible ink, stamps, and colored voter lists. The domestic nation’s military transport was utilized due to the district’s difficult terrain. While 235 ballot boxes were already in stock, an additional 196 were delivered to meet the requirement of three boxes per polling center. Humla currently has 34,372 registered voters, including 18,021 men and 16,351 women, preparing for the upcoming polls.

Mock Election Drills Conducted in Sarlahi District

The Nepal Army and other security agencies conducted a comprehensive mock security drill at a sports field in Malangwa-2 on Saturday. The exercise was designed to prepare personnel for potential clashes at polling stations during the upcoming House of Representatives election on March 5. In Salyan, similar drills led by DSP Dr Hem KC and Chief District Officer Mahendra Kumar Sapkota demonstrated the coordination between the Nepal Police and Armed Police Force. These simulations aim to ensure that the domestic nation’s security apparatus can handle riots or obstructions effectively, maintaining a peaceful environment for voters across the district.

Salyan Mock Poll Records 16% Invalid Votes

A mock election held in Salyan on Saturday revealed a high invalid vote rate of 16.67%. Organized by the Office of the Chief Election Officer, the exercise involved 30 participants to test voting and security procedures for the March 5 polls. Out of 36 mock ballots cast, 6 were found invalid. Chief Election Officer Prahlad Kumar Yogi noted that the exercise also demonstrated a three-tier security strategy involving the Nepal Police, Armed Police Force, and Nepal Army. Information Officer Tejendra Kumar Chand emphasized that voter education programs will be intensified to reduce errors among the district’s 162,449 voters.

Voter Education Volunteers Mobilized in Rukum Paschim

The District Election Office in Rukum Paschim has deployed 73 volunteers to conduct voter education across every ward ahead of the March 5 election. Office Chief Mohanlal KC stated that the campaign, which runs until March 1, focuses on teaching the 106,660 local voters how to correctly mark and fold ballots. Of the 76 polling stations in the district, 21 have been classified as highly sensitive. Trained volunteers are visiting households to minimize invalid votes and ensure a smooth process for the 12 candidates contesting the seat. Local authorities are supervising the door-to-door educational initiative.

Mayors Forum to Build Integrated Cycle Lane

The Kathmandu Valley Mayors Forum has approved a master plan to construct an integrated cycle lane connecting all 18 municipalities. Forum Chairperson Chiri Babu Maharjan announced that the first phase will cover a route from Shivapuri in Budhanilkantha to the Botanical Garden in Godawari. The project aims to promote the ‘Smart City’ concept and reduce reliance on motorcycles. Additionally, the forum decided that all municipalities will share the financial and managerial burden of waste management, which was previously handled primarily by the Kathmandu Metropolitan City. The domestic nation’s government has been urged to draft specific legislation to support the new cycling infrastructure and safety standards.

Political Movies Trend on YouTube Ahead of Elections

A new trend of releasing politically themed films on YouTube has emerged ahead of the House of Representatives election on March 5. Following the digital release of Dimag Kharab and Jhari Pachhi Koo Indreni , the film Senti Virus was uploaded on Friday. Directed by Rambabu Gurung and starring Sitaram Kattel and Kunjana Ghimire, the story mirrors real-world domestic tensions by depicting a couple divided by opposing political loyalties during a village election in Kavre. Analysts view the timing of these releases as a strategic effort to engage voters through social commentary and humor during the peak campaign season.

Rawat and Shrestha Win 14th Dharan 10K Run

Narendra Singh Rawat and Santoshi Shrestha claimed the top titles at the 14th Dharan 10K Run on Saturday. Under the slogan “Charity Run for Education,” Rawat finished the race in 31 minutes and 50 seconds, while Shrestha won the women’s category in 37 minutes and 36 seconds. Julius Muruki Wahome from Kenya secured second place in the men’s division. The winners each received Rs 60,000 along with medals and trophies. Approximately 3,500 runners participated in the event, which was attended by singer Raju Lama. Prizes were also awarded in the veteran and under-16 categories to promote domestic sports.

Nepal Dominates Mount Everest International Taekwondo Medal Tally

Dilika Bhlon secured a gold medal in the women’s 59 kg category at the 4th Mount Everest International Taekwondo Tournament, defeating India’s Shahi Arushi Naga. The event, organized by the Nepal Taekwondo Association, saw multiple domestic victories, including Imon Rana in the 48 kg and Lalit Rana Magar in the 45 kg divisions. While Bhutan’s Sonam Chophel won gold in the 78 kg category, host nation athletes like Kiran Lama and Sonia Tamang also claimed top spots. According to General Secretary Hemanta Dangi, over 1,200 players from 23 countries are competing in this international championship held in the capital.

India, Brazil Target USD 20 Billion Trade in Five Years

India and Brazil on Saturday agreed to set a bilateral trade goal exceeding USD 20 billion within five years, following talks between Prime Minister Narendra Modi and Brazilian President Luiz Inacio Lula Da Silva. Discussions focused on critical minerals, security, and broader trade cooperation. Modi described Brazil as India’s largest Latin American trading partner and praised President Lula’s leadership. He said joint efforts strengthen the voice of the Global South and emphasized that terrorism and its supporters are threats to all humanity. Modi confirmed the commitment to deepen economic and strategic ties while expanding collaboration across key sectors.

Microsoft Names Asha Sharma Gaming CEO as Phil Spencer Retires

Microsoft announced on Friday that gaming chief Phil Spencer is retiring after 38 years, with Asha Sharma appointed as executive vice president and CEO of its gaming division. Sharma, formerly leading AI product development at Microsoft, aims to refocus on Xbox and core players. The move follows challenges including tariff-driven costs, stiff competition from Sony, and a 9.5% decline in gaming revenue last quarter. Spencer will stay in an advisory role through the summer. Microsoft also confirmed the departure of Sarah Bond and the reshuffling of leadership, including Matt Booty as executive VP and chief content officer, reporting to Sharma.
translated:
काठमांडू : नेपाल न्यूज केरऽ सांझ केरऽ ब्रिफिंग स॑ अपडेट रहऽ, जेकरा म॑ नेपाल आरू पूरा विश्व केरऽ दिन केरऽ सबसें महत्वपूर्ण घटनाक्रम आपने सब के सामने आबी रहलऽ छै । राजनीति आरू अर्थव्यवस्था स॑ ल॑ क॑ खेल, मनोरंजन, आरू संस्कृति तक, हम्मं॑ आपने क॑ जानना जरूरी शीर्ष खबरऽ के संक्षिप्त गोल-मटोल दै छियै ।

प्रधानमंत्री चुनाव बहिष्कार रंगदारी के खिलाफ चेतावनी

प्रधानमन्त्री सुशीला कार्की आइ बुटवलमे अधिकारीसबसँग बैसारके क्रममे निर्वाचन सुरक्षाके सम्बन्धमे गम्भीर चिन्ता व्यक्त कएलनि अछि । हुनी सुरक्षा एजेंसी सिनी क छोटौ समूहौ के खिलाफ सतर्क रहै के निर्देश देलकै, जे निष्पक्ष रूप स॑ मुकाबला नै करी सकै छै, बहिष्कार के धमकी के इस्तेमाल करी क॑ जनता स॑ पैसा वसूली आरू अपनऽ राजनीतिक अस्तित्व क॑ कायम रखै छै । नेता न॑ संभावित प्राकृतिक चुनौती प॑ भी प्रकाश डाललकै, जेना कि रुकुम पुरबा म॑ बर्फबारी आरू आबै वाला होली महोत्सव, जेकरा स॑ शांति प॑ असर पड़॑ सकै छै । एकरऽ अलावा हुनी नोट करलकै कि तराई क्षेत्र मँ पार्टी के झंडा जलै के हाल के घटना स॑ प्रतिस्पर्धा बढ़ै के संकेत मिलै छै जेकरा स॑ प्रतिद्वंदी गुटऽ के बीच आरू हिंसक झड़प होय सकै छै ।

5 मार्च के चुनाव स पहिने ईसी बैलेट पेपर डिलीवरी पूरा केलक

निर्वाचन आयोग सुदुरपश्चिम, कर्णाली, आ कोशी प्रान्तमे मतपत्र आ सामग्री पहुँचा देने अछि, आ अन्य प्रान्तमे परिवहन जारी अछि । जनक शिक्षा समागरी केन्द्र लिमिटेड १६ फरवरीके मुद्रण सम्पन्न भेल अछि, जाहिमे २ करोड़ ३० लाख फर्स्ट-पास्ट-द-पोस्ट आ २ करोड़ ८.३ करोड़ आनुपातिक प्रतिनिधित्व मतपत्रक उत्पादन भेल अछि । नेपाल के 1.89 करोड़ पात्र मतदाता 275 सदस्यीय निचला सदन, एफपीटीपी के माध्यम सं 165 आ आनुपातिक प्रतिनिधित्व के माध्यम सं 110 सदस्य के चुनाव करताह. 10 दिन के भीतर सब 77 जिला में डिलीवरी के उम्मीद अछि। अन्य 51टा चुनावी सामग्री क परिवहन भ गेल अछि। चुनाव 5 मार्च के होबय वाला अछि, जखन कि दू सप्ताह सं कम समय अछि.

दू समुदाय के बीच फेर स झड़प के बाद गौर में कर्फ्यू लगाओल गेल

जिल्ला प्रशासन कार्यालय रौतहट २ समुदायके बीच फेरसँ झड़पके बाद जिल्ला मुख्यालय गौरमे आइ दुपहर १ बजेसँ अनिश्चितकालीन निषेधाज्ञा लगा देने अछि । शुक्रदिन साँझ ६ बुँदे सहमति भेलाक बादो गौर नगरपालिका ६ गौर नगरपालिका ६ मे फेर सँ हिंसा प्रारंभ भेलाक बाद जिल्ला सुरक्षा समिति ई निर्णय लेलक अछि । शनिदिन भोर 9 बजे के आसपास पत्थरबाजी शुरू भ गेल। एहि कर्फ्यू मे पूर्व मे मुडबलवा गेट स ल कए पश्चिम मे लालबकेया तटबंध, उत्तर मे बाम नहर, आ दक्षिण मे गौर सीमा शुल्क कार्यालय गेट तक शामिल अछि। मुख्य जिल्ला अधिकारी दिनेश सागर भुसाल कहलनि जे, आवागमन, सभा, बैसार, जुलूस, आ प्रदर्शन पर सख्त रोक अछि, जाहि मे उल्लंघन करय वाला के कानूनी कार्रवाई के अधीन अछि। वार्ड 4, 5, आ 6 मे झड़प के खबरि आयल अछि, प्रदर्शनकारी कथित तौर पर गाड़ी मे आगि लगा देलक आ घर मे तोड़फोड़ केलक, आ किछु व्यक्ति के मामूली चोट लागल अछि. पुलिस चेतावनी गोली चलौलक आ आंसू गैस के प्रयोग क स्थिति के नियंत्रित केलक। नेपाल प्रहरी आ सशस्त्र प्रहरी बल नेपालसँ सैकड़ो जवान तैनात कएल गेल अछि । सुरक्षा अभियान के देखरेख में पुलिस अधीक्षक सीताराम रिजाल आ सशस्त्र पुलिस अधीक्षक राम हरि अधिकारी स्थल पर छथि।

कांग्रेस चुनावी रैली मे कार्यकर्ताक संग पुलिसक झड़प

नेपाली कांग्रेसके आयोजनामे भेल झड़पके बाद शनिदिन भोकराहा नरसिंह गाउँपालिका–४ सुनसरीमे पुलिस लाठी चार्जके सहारा लेलक । सुनसरी निर्वाचन क्षेत्र ४ मे प्रत्याशी ज्ञानेन्द्र कार्की के समर्थक के राष्ट्रीय स्वतंत्र पार्टी के युवा कार्यकर्ता के सामना भेला पर हिंसा भड़कल। पुलिस उप अधीक्षक केशव थेबे के अनुसार स्थिति अस्थिर भेला पर तरुण दल के सदस्य आ पार्टी के विरोधी कार्यकर्ता के तितर-बितर करय लेल अधिकारी हस्तक्षेप केलक। जखन कि कोनो पैघ चोट के खबर नहिं अछि, घरेलू राष्ट्र के सुरक्षा बल हाई अलर्ट पर रहल. पुलिस एहि बातक पुष्टि केलक अछि जे, तकर बाद इलाकाक स्थिति पर काबू आबि गेल अछि।

राजनीतिक दल के झंडा जलाने के आरोप में पुलिस द्वारा गिरफ्तार व्यक्ति

सप्तरी जिल्ला प्रहरी महादेव गाउँपालिका–५ मे शनिदिन राजनैतिक ध्वज दहनके आरोपमे २५ वर्षीय युवकके पक्राउ केने अछि । प्रहरी उपाधीक्षक डम्बर बहादुर पुरीके अनुसार हरिनारायण मण्डल नामके संदिग्ध भागवतपुर चौकमे निर्वाचन प्रचारके लेल रस्सीमे लटकल नेकपाके झंडा हटबैत आगि लगा देलक । कथित तौर पर “निर्वाचन पुलिस” स्वयंसेवी समूह के सदस्य व्यक्ति के घटना के तुरंत बाद हिरासत में लेल गेल। जिला मे चुनावी तनाव बढ़ला सं अधिकारी आगजनी के पाछु के मकसद के पता लगाबय लेल औपचारिक जांच शुरू क देलखिन्ह.

बनेपा मे वाहन आगजनी के बाद 13 गिरफ्तार

बनेपा मे टिपर ट्रक मे आगि लगेबा मे कथित संलग्नताक आरोप मे काभ्रे पुलिस 13 गोटे के गिरफ्तार केलक अछि। 18 फरवरी कए 30 वर्षीय स्कूटर चालक ओमान प्रधान कए टिपर स जानलेवा प्रहार क बाद इ घटना भेल।एह त्रासदी क बाद भीड़ पत्थरबाजी आ आगजनी मे लागल गाड़ी कए तबाह क देलक। हिरासत मे लेल गेल लोक मे बिदुर बुधाथोकी, विकास राय, आ श्याम मानन्धर शामिल छथि। स्थानीय अदालत अधिकारी कए संदिग्ध कए सात दिन तक हिरासत मे रखबाक अनुमति देलक, जाहि स आगू क जांच मे सुविधा होए। पुलिस एखन निगरानी आ गवाहक विवरण के समीक्षा क रहल अछि जाहि सं स्थानीय अशांति मे शामिल अतिरिक्त प्रतिभागी के पहचान भ सकय.

चितवन-परसा मे 60 टा टाइगर ट्रैकिंग कैमरा गायब

हालहि मे चितवन आ पर्सा नेशनल पार्क परिसर मे भेल बाघ जनगणना मे तैनात 1780 मे स 60 कैमरा लापता भ गेल। चितवन राष्ट्रिय उद्यान मगरके सूचना अधिकारी अबिनाश थापा बृहस्पतिदिन २५ अतिरिक्त कैमरा क्षतिग्रस्त भेटल अछि । कई सप्ताह मे 958 ग्रिड क उपयोग करय वाला जनगणना एहि गुरुवार कए समाप्त भ गेल। उपकरण के नुकसान के बावजूद अधिकारि सब प्रति ग्रिड दू वर्ग किलोमीटर के खंड के पार निगरानी पूरा केलक। पिछला जनगणना 2022 मे घरेलू राष्ट्र मे 355 वयस्क बाघ दर्ज कैल गेल अछि, जाहि मे चितवन मे 128 आ पर्सा मे 41 अछि। फिलहाल एहि नव गिनती क आंकड़ा कए एहि साल क अंत मे आधिकारिक प्रकाशन लेल प्रोसेस कैल जा रहल अछि।

धनकुटा मतदान केन्द्र महिला प्राधिकारी द्वारा प्रबन्धित

लैंगिक समावेशीता के दिशा में उल्लेखनीय कदम उठाबैत धनकुटा के मुख्य निर्वाचन अधिकारी के कार्यालय 5 मार्च के चुनाव के लेल एकटा विशिष्ट मतदान केन्द्र के प्रबंधन एकटा सर्वमहिला कर्मचारी के घोषणा केलक अछि। धनकुटा नगरपालिका–६ स्थित बहुउद्देशीय सामुदायिक भवन नेत्र अस्पतालमे स्थित केन्द्रके नेतृत्व मतदान अधिकारी इन्दिरा खड्का बुधाथोकी करल रहै । मुख्य निर्वाचन अधिकारी हरीश चंद्र इंगनुम के कहनाय छनि जे जिला के अधिकांश 166 केंद्र मे मिश्रित कर्मचारी रहत, मुदा एहि विशेष स्थल पर छह कर्मी के सर्वमहिला टीम रहत. घरेलू राष्ट्र केरऽ जिला भर म॑ अभी कुल ९९६ कर्मचारी क॑ चुनावी कर्तव्य लेली तैनात करलऽ जाय रहलऽ छै ।

हुमला में सेना ने चुनावी सामान पहुंचा

सुदूर जिल्ला हुमलामे शनिदिन नेपाल सेनाके स्काई ट्रकके माध्यमसँ आवश्यक निर्वाचन सामग्री पहुँचल अछि । जिला निर्वाचन अधिकारी भीम बहादुर रोकाया मतपेटी, सुरक्षा मुहर, अमिट स्याही, डाक टिकट, आ रंगीन मतदाता सूची के वितरण के पुष्टि केलनि। जिला केरऽ कठिन इलाका के कारण घरेलू राष्ट्र केरऽ सैन्य परिवहन के उपयोग करलऽ गेलै । जखन कि 235 मतपेटी पहिने स स्टॉक मे छल, मुदा प्रति मतदान केंद्र तीन बक्सा क आवश्यकता कए पूरा करबा लेल 196टा अतिरिक्त डिलीवर कैल गेल। हुमला मे एखन 34,372 पंजीकृत मतदाता छथि, जाहि मे 18,021 पुरुष आ 16,351 महिला आगामी चुनाव क तैयारी मे छथि।

सर्लाही जिला में नकली चुनाव अभ्यास संचालित

नेपाली सेना आ अन्य सुरक्षा संस्था सब शनिदिन मलंगवा–२ के खेल मैदान मे व्यापक नकली सुरक्षा अभ्यास केने छल । 5 मार्च के आगामी प्रतिनिधि सभा के चुनाव के दौरान मतदान केंद्र पर संभावित झड़प के लेल कर्मी के तैयार करय लेल ई अभ्यास कायल गेल छल.सलयन मे डीएसपी डॉ. हेम केसी आ मुख्य जिल्ला अधिकारी महेन्द्र कुमार सापकोटा के नेतृत्व मे एहने अभ्यास मे नेपाल प्रहरी आ सशस्त्र प्रहरी बल के बीच समन्वय के प्रदर्शन भेल अछि. ई सिमुलेशनऽ के उद्देश्य ई सुनिश्चित करना छै कि घरेलू राष्ट्र केरऽ सुरक्षा तंत्र दंगा या बाधा क॑ प्रभावी ढंग स॑ संभाल॑ सक॑, जेकरा स॑ पूरा जिला म॑ मतदाता लेली शांतिपूर्ण माहौल बनलऽ जाय सक॑ ।

सलयन मॉक पोल रिकॉर्ड 16% अमान्य वोट

शनिदिन सलयन मे भेल नकली चुनाव मे 16.67% के उच्च अमान्य वोट दर के खुलासा भेल अछि. मुख्य निर्वाचन अधिकारी कार्यालय द्वारा आयोजित एहि अभ्यास मे 30 प्रतिभागी शामिल छलाह जे 5 मार्च कए होए वाला चुनाव लेल मतदान आ सुरक्षा प्रक्रिया क परीक्षण केलथि। 36 नकली मतदान मे स 6टा अमान्य पाओल गेल। मुख्य निर्वाचन अधिकारी प्रहलाद कुमार योगी अभ्यासमे नेपाल प्रहरी, सशस्त्र प्रहरी बल, आ नेपाली सेना सहित तीन स्तरीय सुरक्षा रणनीति सेहो प्रदर्शित भेल उल्लेख कएलनि । सूचना अधिकारी तेजेन्द्र कुमार चंद एहि बात पर जोर देलनि जे जिला के 162,449 मतदाता मे गलती कम करय लेल मतदाता शिक्षा कार्यक्रम तेज कएल जाएत.

रुकुम पश्चिम में मतदाता शिक्षा स्वयंसेवक जुटाए

रुकुम पश्चिम स्थित जिल्ला निर्वाचन कार्यालय ५ मार्चके निर्वाचनसँ पूर्व प्रत्येक वार्डमे मतदाता शिक्षा करवाक ७३ स्वयंसेवक तैनात केने अछि । कार्यालय प्रमुख मोहनलाल केसी कहलनि जे, एक मार्च तक चलय वाला एहि अभियान मे 106,660 स्थानीय मतदाता के मतपत्र के सही तरीका सं चिन्हित करय आओर मोड़य के तरीका सिखाबय पर केन्द्रित अछि. जिला के 76 मतदान केंद्र मे सं 21 के अत्यधिक संवेदनशील के रूप मे वर्गीकृत कएल गेल अछि. अमान्य वोट कम सं कम करय आओर सीट पर चुनाव लड़य वाला 12 उम्मीदवार के लेल सुचारू प्रक्रिया सुनिश्चित करय लेल प्रशिक्षित स्वयंसेवक घर-घर मे जा रहल छथिन्ह. स्थानीय प्राधिकारी डोर-टू-डोर शैक्षिक पहल क देखरेख क रहल अछि।

एकीकृत साइकिल लेन बनेबाक लेल मेयर फोरम

काठमांडू उपत्यका मेयर फोरम सब १८ नगरपालिका के जोड़ै वाला एकीकृत साइकिल लेन के निर्माण के गुरु योजना के स्वीकृति देलक अछि । फोरम के अध्यक्ष चिरी बाबू महर्जन घोषणा केलनि जे पहिल चरण मे बुधनिलकंठ के शिवपुरी सं गोदावारी के वनस्पति उद्यान तक के मार्ग के कवर कएल जाएत. ई परियोजना के उद्देश्य ‘स्मार्ट सिटी’ अवधारणा क॑ बढ़ावा देना आरू मोटरसाइकिल प॑ निर्भरता क॑ कम करना छै । एकरऽ अलावा मंच न॑ फैसला करलकै कि सब नगरपालिका अपशिष्ट प्रबंधन केरऽ आर्थिक आरू प्रबंधकीय बोझ क॑ साझा करतै, जेकरा पहिने मुख्य रूप स॑ काठमांडू महानगर द्वारा संभाललऽ जाय छेलै । घरेलू राष्ट्र सरकार स॑ आग्रह करलऽ गेलऽ छै कि साइकिल चलाबै के नया बुनियादी ढाँचा आरू सुरक्षा मानक के समर्थन लेली विशिष्ट कानून के मसौदा तैयार करलऽ जाय ।

चुनाव स पहिने यूट्यूब पर राजनीतिक सिनेमा ट्रेंड

5 मार्च क॑ प्रतिनिधि सभा के चुनाव स॑ पहल॑ यूट्यूब प॑ राजनीतिक थीम प॑ बनलऽ फिल्म रिलीज करै के एगो नया ट्रेंड सामने ऐलऽ छै ।दिमाग खरब आरू झारी पच्ची कू इंद्रेनी के डिजिटल रिलीज के बाद शुक्रवार क॑ फिल्म सेंटी वायरस अपलोड करलऽ गेलै । रामबाबू गुरुंग द्वारा निर्देशित आरू सीताराम कटेल आरू कुंजना घिमिरे अभिनीत ई कहानी काभ्रे के गाँव के चुनाव के दौरान विरोधी राजनीतिक निष्ठा स॑ बंटलऽ एगो जोड़ी के चित्रण करी क॑ वास्तविक दुनिया के घरेलू तनाव के प्रतिबिंबित करै छै । विश्लेषक ई रिलीज के समय क॑ पीक प्रचार के मौसम म॑ सामाजिक टिप्पणी आरू हास्य के माध्यम स॑ मतदाता सिनी क॑ संलग्न करै के रणनीतिक प्रयास के रूप म॑ देखै छै ।

रावत एवं श्रेष्ठ जीत 14वीं धरान 10K रन

नरेन्द्र सिंह रावत आ संतोषी श्रेष्ठ शनिदिन १४म धरान १० कि.मी. “चैरिटी रन फॉर एजुकेशन” के नारा के तहत रावत 31 मिनट 50 सेकेंड में दौड़ समाप्त केलनि, जखन कि श्रेष्ठ महिला वर्ग में 37 मिनट 36 सेकेंड में जीत हासिल केलनि। केन्या केरऽ जूलियस मुरुकी वाहोमे न॑ पुरुष डिवीजन म॑ दोसरऽ स्थान हासिल करी लेलकै । विजेता कए 60-60 हजार टका क संग मेडल आ ट्राफी सेहो देल गेल। लगभग 3500 धावक न॑ भाग लेलकै, जेकरा म॑ गायक राजू लामा न॑ भाग लेलकै । घरेलू खेल कए बढ़ावा देबा लेल दिग्गज आ अंडर-16 वर्ग मे सेहो पुरस्कार देल गेल।

माउन्ट एवरेस्ट अन्तर्राष्ट्रिय ताइक्वाण्डो पदक टैलीमे नेपाल हावी अछि

चौथा माउंट एवरेस्ट अंतर्राष्ट्रीय ताइक्वांडो टूर्नामेंट म॑ महिला ५९ किलोग्राम वर्ग म॑ दिलिका भलोन न॑ भारत केरऽ शाही आरुषी नागा क॑ हराबैत॑ स्वर्ण पदक हासिल करलकै । नेपाल ताइक्वाण्डो संघ द्वारा आयोजित ई आयोजनमे ४८ किलोग्राममे इमोन राना आ ४५ किलोग्राममे ललित राणा मगर सहित अनेक घरेलू जीत भेल छल । भूटान केरऽ सोनम चोफेल न॑ ७८ किलोग्राम वर्ग म॑ स्वर्ण पदक जीतल॑ छै, जबकि मेजबान राष्ट्र केरऽ किरण लामा आरू सोनिया तामांग जैसनऽ एथलीट न॑ भी शीर्ष स्थान प॑ दावा करलकै । महासचिव हेमंत डांगी के अनुसार राजधानी मँ आयोजित ई अंतर्राष्ट्रीय चैंपियनशिप मँ २३ देशौ के १२०० सँ अधिक खिलाड़ी प्रतिस्पर्धा करी रहलौ छै ।

भारत, ब्राजील पांच वर्ष मे 20 अरब डॉलर के व्यापार के लक्ष्य |

भारत आरू ब्राजील न॑ शनिदिन प्रधानमंत्री नरेंद्र मोदी आरू ब्राजील केरऽ राष्ट्रपति लुईज इनासियो लूला दा सिल्वा के बीच बातचीत के बाद पांच साल के भीतर २० अरब डॉलर स॑ अधिक के द्विपक्षीय व्यापार लक्ष्य तय करै प॑ सहमत होय गेलै । चर्चा महत्वपूर्ण खनिज, सुरक्षा, आ व्यापक व्यापारिक सहयोग पर केंद्रित छल । मोदी न॑ ब्राजील क॑ भारत केरऽ सबस॑ बड़ऽ लैटिन अमेरिकी व्यापारिक भागीदार बतैलकै आरू राष्ट्रपति लूला केरऽ नेतृत्व के प्रशंसा करलकै । हुनी कहलकै कि संयुक्त प्रयास स॑ ग्लोबल साउथ के आवाज मजबूत होय छै आरू आतंकवाद आरू ओकरऽ समर्थक सब मानवता लेली खतरा छै, ई बात प॑ जोर देलकै । मोदी न॑ आर्थिक आरू सामरिक संबंध क॑ गहरा करै के प्रतिबद्धता के पुष्टि करलकै आरू साथ ही साथ प्रमुख क्षेत्रऽ म॑ सहयोग के विस्तार करलकै ।

माइक्रोसॉफ्ट आशा शर्मा गेमिंग के सीईओ के रूप मे फिल स्पेंसर रिटायर के रूप मे नामित केलक अछि

माइक्रोसॉफ्ट न॑ शुक्रवार क॑ घोषणा करलकै कि गेमिंग चीफ फिल स्पेंसर ३८ साल बाद रिटायर होय रहलऽ छै, जेकरा म॑ आशा शर्मा क॑ ओकरऽ गेमिंग डिवीजन केरऽ कार्यकारी उपाध्यक्ष आरू सीईओ के रूप म॑ नियुक्त करलऽ गेलऽ छै । पहिने माइक्रोसॉफ्ट केरऽ एआई प्रोडक्ट डेवलपमेंट केरऽ अग्रणी रहलऽ शर्मा केरऽ लक्ष्य छै कि एक्सबॉक्स आरू कोर प्लेयर प॑ फेर स॑ ध्यान देलऽ जाय । ई कदम टैरिफ संचालित लागत, सोनी केरऽ कड़ा प्रतिस्पर्धा, आरू पिछला तिमाही म॑ गेमिंग केरऽ राजस्व म॑ ९.५% के गिरावट सहित चुनौती के बाद उठालऽ गेलऽ छै । स्पेंसर गर्मी के दौरान सलाहकार के भूमिका मे रहताह. माइक्रोसॉफ्ट न॑ सारा बॉन्ड केरऽ जाय आरू नेतृत्व म॑ फेरबदल के भी पुष्टि करलकै, जेकरा म॑ मैट बूटी क॑ कार्यकारी वीपी आरू मुख्य सामग्री अधिकारी के रूप म॑ शामिल करलऽ गेलै, जेकरा म॑ शर्मा क॑ रिपोर्टिंग करलऽ गेलै ।

title: RSP rides reform wave, old guard digs in ahead of Nepal’s elections - The Hindu
description: RSP rides reform wave, old guard digs in ahead of Nepal’s elections  The Hindu
publisher.title: The Hindu
full_article:
Political parties in Nepal have launched campaigns for the March 5 parliamentary elections, necessitated by last September’s Gen Z protests.

Gen Z and the dynamics of democratic engagement

The Nepali Congress, the country’s oldest party, kicked off its campaign rally from Janakpur in Madhesh, a province bordering India, on February 18, as it seeks to reclaim its clout in the region. The Rastriya Swatantra Party (RSP), a relatively new force in Nepal that rose from the 2022 elections, organised its election gathering in Dhangadhi, a city in Nepal’s far-western region.

Nepal’s election takes shape as parties file nominations

Various other parties have scheduled their programmes, with the vote just two weeks away.

The coming elections are seen as a litmus test for Nepal’s traditional parties, which have drawn scorn from various quarters for their failures, despite ruling the country for the last three decades. Change is the common refrain among voters, but there is little clarity as to what exactly that means, except for one apparent issue that stands out — there is palpable frustration with the old parties.

Also Read | With Nepal’s largest party divided ahead of polls, EC decides on legitimacy dispute

Tanka Lama, from Ramechhap, a district around 150 km east of Kathmandu, says it’s time Nepalis voted for a party other than the Nepali Congress or the Communist Party of Nepal-UML. “I had plans to vote for the RSP, but since Balendra Shah has joined the party as its PM candidate, I have changed my mind,” said Mr. Lama, 25, who drives a taxi in Kathmandu. “I will probably vote for Ujyalo [Nepal Party].”

The RSP was formed just six months before the 2022 elections by former TV host Rabi Lamichhane. Riding on the wave of widespread discontent against Nepal’s traditional parties, it emerged as the fourth-largest force. Mr. Lamichhane is a controversial figure, facing charges of embezzling cooperative funds, while Mr. Shah, who resigned as Kathmandu’s mayor, remains a Marmite figure.

Bet on the bell

Nityanand, an analyst based in Janakpur, says voters do not seem to care much about Mr. Lamichhane or Mr. Shah; the wave is such that everyone says “ghanti,” or the bell, the election symbol of the RSP. “The RSP wave is unprecedented. It’s a different matter whether the street emotions will materialise into actual votes,” he said.

Apart from the RSP, other new forces are also emerging. The Ujyalo Nepal Party came into being only recently, launched by Kulmang Ghising, a former technocrat credited with ending Nepal’s hours-long power outages.

As many as 68 parties are contesting the March 5 polls, with more than 3,000 candidates running for the 275-member House of Representatives. In Nepal, 165 members are elected under the directly elected first-past-the-post system, while 110 are elected under the proportional representation (PR) system. This mixed system makes it extremely difficult for any party to secure a majority.

The question many are asking this time is who will emerge as the biggest party. Though the street wave leans towards the RSP, it is a force with a weaker organisational structure compared to parties like the Nepali Congress or the CPN-UML. The Maoist party, led by Pushpa Kamal Dahal, who led the 10-year-long insurgency from 1996 to 2006, has now transformed into the Nepali Communist Party. Mr. Dahal, a two-time Prime Minister, has moved to Rukum — a Maoist stronghold during the insurgency — in search of a safe constituency, an indication of how the party’s appeal has waned over the years.

Until 2022, Nepal’s electoral trend showed little to no swing votes, with the Congress and the UML usually standing out. In 2008, the Maoist party, which had just emerged from the war, stunned many as it became the single largest party. But in elections after the 2015 constitution, the Congress and the UML have led. That pattern was disrupted in 2022 with the emergence of the RSP.

When the Gen Z protests happened in September 2025, which left 77 dead, the UML’s K.P. Sharma Oli was the Prime Minister with the backing of the Congress. Dissatisfaction with these parties had already been simmering, as the protests called for an end to a status quo entrenched by the old guard that many believed was promoting corruption and mis-governance. Many also hold the two parties responsible for the protest deaths.

Mr. Oli resigned on September 9. President Ram Chandra Poudel, on September 12, formed an interim government led by Sushila Karki, a former Chief Justice. The interim administration dissolved the House and called elections for March 5.

As many as 19 million people, out of Nepal’s 30 million population, are eligible to vote, with around one million voters — mostly youth — added to the rolls after the protests.

Mr. Lama, the taxi driver, says voting out old parties does not necessarily mean everything will change and improve in the country, but since the Gen Z protests demanded change, the country must see a shift. “I know even if the RSP wins, it cannot form a government alone,” he said. “But the point is we have already seen other parties, let’s give a new party a chance.”
translated:
पिछला सितम्बर के जेन जेड विरोध के कारण जरूरी भेल नेपाल के राजनीतिक दल 5 मार्च के संसदीय चुनाव के लेल अभियान शुरू केलक अछि.

जेन जेड एवं लोकतांत्रिक जुड़ाव की गतिशीलता |

देश केरऽ सबसें पुरानऽ पार्टी नेपाली कांग्रेस न॑ ई क्षेत्र म॑ अपनऽ दबदबा वापस लेबै के कोशिश करतें हुअ॑ भारत केरऽ सीमावर्ती प्रांत मधेश केरऽ जनकपुर स॑ १८ फरवरी क॑ अपनऽ प्रचार रैली के शुरुआत करलकै । २०२२ के चुनाव स उठल नेपाल के अपेक्षाकृत नव शक्ति राष्ट्रिय स्वतंत्र पार्टी नेपाल के सुदूर पश्चिम क्षेत्र के शहर धनगढी मे अपन चुनावी सभा के आयोजन केलक ।

पार्टी सब नामांकन दाखिल करैत नेपाल के चुनाव के आकार लैत अछि

विभिन्न अन्य दल अपन कार्यक्रम निर्धारित कएने अछि, मतदान मे मात्र दू सप्ताह बाँकी अछि।

आबै वाला चुनाव क॑ नेपाल केरऽ पारंपरिक दल लेली लिटमस टेस्ट के रूप म॑ देखलऽ जाय रहलऽ छै, जेकरा न॑ पिछला तीन दशक स॑ देश प॑ शासन करला के बावजूद भी अपनऽ असफलता के चलतें विभिन्न तरफऽ स॑ तिरस्कार के शिकार होय रहलऽ छै । मतदाता के बीच परिवर्तन आम परहेज छै, लेकिन एकरऽ मतलब ठीक-ठीक की छै, एकरा म॑ बहुत कम स्पष्टता छै, सिवाय एक स्पष्ट मुद्दा के जे सामने आबी रहलऽ छै — पुरानऽ दलऽ के साथ स्पर्शजोग कुंठा छै ।

इहो पढ़ू | चुनाव स पहिने नेपाल के सबस पैघ पार्टी के विभाजन के संग ईसी वैधता विवाद पर फैसला करैत अछि

काठमांडू सं करीब डेढ़ 50 किलोमीटर पूर्व जिला रामेछाप के टंका लामा के कहनाय छनि जे आब समय आबि गेल अछि जे नेपाली कांग्रेस या नेपाल-एमाले कम्युनिस्ट पार्टी के अलावा दोसर पार्टी के वोट देथिन्ह. काठमांडू मे टैक्सी चलाबै वाला २५ वर्षीय श्री लामा कहलनि जे, आरएसपा के वोट देबय के योजना छल, मुदा बलेन्द्र शाह पार्टी के पीएम उम्मीदवार के रूप मे शामिल भेला स हम अपन विचार बदलि लेलहुं अछि। “हम शायद उज्यालो [नेपाल पार्टी] के वोट देब।”

2022 के चुनाव स मात्र छह मास पहिने आरएसपा के गठन पूर्व टीवी होस्ट रबी लामिछाने केने छलाह। नेपाल केरऽ पारंपरिक दलऽ के खिलाफ व्यापक असंतोष के लहर प॑ सवार ई चारिम सबसें बड़ऽ ताकत के रूप म॑ उभरी क॑ सामने ऐलै । श्री लामिछाने एकटा विवादित हस्ती छथि, हुनका पर सहकारी धन के गबन के आरोप अछि, जखन कि काठमांडू के मेयर के पद सं इस्तीफा देबय वाला श्री शाह मरमाइट के हस्ती बनल छथिन्ह.

घंटी पर दांव लगाउ

जनकपुर के विश्लेषक नित्यानंद के कहनाय छनि जे मतदाता के श्री लामिछाने या श्री शाह के बेसी चिंता नहिं बुझाइत छनि; लहर एहन अछि जे सब कहैत अछि “घंटी,” या घंटी, आरएसपी के चुनावी प्रतीक। ओ कहला जे आरएसपी क लहर अभूतपूर्व अछि, सड़क क भावना वास्तविक वोट मे मूर्त रूप लेत या नहि इ अलग गप अछि।

आरएसपी के अलावा आओर नव ताकत सेहो सामने आबि रहल अछि. उज्यालो नेपाल पार्टी हालहि मे अस्तित्व मे आयल अछि, जकर शुभारंभ नेपालक घंटों धरि चलल बिजलीक कटौती केँ समाप्त करबाक श्रेय देल गेल पूर्व टेक्नोक्रेट कुलमांग घिसिंग द्वारा कयल गेल छल ।

5 मार्च कए होए वाला चुनाव मे 68टा पार्टी लड़ि रहल अछि, जाहि मे 275 सदस्यीय प्रतिनिधि सभा मे 3 हजार स बेसी उम्मीदवार चुनाव लड़ि रहल छथि। नेपालमे प्रत्यक्ष निर्वाचित प्रथम-पास्ट-द-पोस्ट प्रणालीक अन्तर्गत १६५ सदस्य निर्वाचित होइत अछि, जखन कि ११० सदस्य आनुपातिक प्रतिनिधित्व (पीआर) प्रणालीक अन्तर्गत निर्वाचित होइत अछि । एहि मिश्रित व्यवस्था स कोनो पार्टी कए बहुमत भेटब अत्यंत कठिन भ जाइत अछि।

एहि बेर बहुतो लोक जे सवाल पूछि रहल छथिन्ह ओ अछि जे के बड़का पार्टी के रूप मे सामने आओत. सड़कक लहर आरएसपा दिस झुकला पर नेपाली कांग्रेस वा नेकपा एमाले सन दलक अपेक्षा ई कमजोर संगठनात्मक संरचना बला शक्ति अछि । 1996 स 2006 तक 10 साल तक चलल विद्रोह क नेतृत्व करय वाला पुष्पकमल दाहाल क नेतृत्व मे माओवादी पार्टी आब नेपाली कम्युनिस्ट पार्टी मे परिणत भ गेल अछि। दू बेर के प्रधानमंत्री रहल श्री दाहाल सुरक्षित क्षेत्र के तलाश में रुकुम – विद्रोह के दौरान माओवादी गढ़ – चलि गेल छथि, जे एहि बात के संकेत अछि जे पार्टी के अपील सालों सं कोना कम भ गेल अछि.

2022 तक नेपाल के चुनावी प्रवृत्ति मे स्विंग वोट कम या कोनो तरहक नहि देखल गेल छल, जाहि मे कांग्रेस आओर एमाले आमतौर पर अलग छल. 2008 मे एखनहि युद्ध स निकलल माओवादी पार्टी एकल सबस पैघ पार्टी बनला स बहुतो कए स्तब्ध क देलक। मुदा 2015 के संविधान के बाद भेल चुनाव मे कांग्रेस आओर एमाले के नेतृत्व भेल अछि. ओ पैटर्न 2022 मे आरएसपी क उदय स बाधित भ गेल।

सितम्बर २०२५ मे जखन जेन जेड विरोध भेल छल, जाहि मे ७७ गोटेक मृत्यु भेल छल तखन एमाले के के.पी. शर्मा ओली कांग्रेस क समर्थन स प्रधानमंत्री छलाह। एहि दल सब स असंतोष पहिने स उबलैत छल, किया कि विरोध प्रदर्शन मे पुरान गार्ड स जड़ जमा लेने यथास्थिति कए समाप्त करबाक आह्वान कैल गेल छल जेकरा बहुतो लोक कए मानैत छल जे भ्रष्टाचार आ कुशासन कए बढ़ावा द रहल अछि। विरोध मे भेल मौत के लेल सेहो बहुतो लोक दुनु दल के जिम्मेदार ठहराबैत छथिन्ह.

श्री ओली 9 सितंबर कए इस्तीफा द देलथि।राष्ट्रपति रामचंद्र पौडेल 12 सितंबर कए पूर्व मुख्य न्यायाधीश सुशीला कार्की क नेतृत्व मे अंतरिम सरकार बनेलथि। अंतरिम प्रशासन सदन के भंग क 5 मार्च के चुनाव के आह्वान केलक।

नेपाल केरऽ तीन करोड़ आबादी म॑ स॑ १ करोड़ ९० लाख लोग मतदान करै के पात्र छै, जेकरा म॑ विरोध प्रदर्शन के बाद लगभग दस लाख मतदाता – जेकरा म॑ अधिकतर युवा छै – के नाम शामिल छै ।

श्री. टैक्सी ड्राइवर लामा के कहनाय छनि जे पुरान पार्टी के वोट आउट करय के मतलब ई जरूरी नहिं जे देश मे सब किछ बदलत आओर सुधार होएत, मुदा जेन जेड के विरोध मे बदलाव के मांग भेल छल ताहि लेल देश मे बदलाव देखय पड़त. ओ कहलनि जे, हमरा बुझल अछि जे आरएसपी जीत गेला पर सेहो असगरे सरकार नहि बना सकैत अछि। “मुदा बात ई जे हम सब आन पार्टी के देख चुकल छी, एकटा नव पार्टी के मौका दियौ।”

BBA Career in Nepal: Opportunities & Scope

Are you guys thinking about what to do with your Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) degree in Nepal? Well, you’re in the right place! A BBA can open up a ton of exciting career paths in Nepal. Let’s dive into the awesome opportunities and scope you’ll have.

Table of Contents What is a BBA Anyway?

Core Areas Covered in a BBA Program

Why Study BBA in Nepal?

Growing Economy

Industry Demand

Entrepreneurial Opportunities

Affordable Education

Top Career Opportunities After BBA in Nepal

1. Management Trainee

2. Marketing Manager

3. Financial Analyst

4. Human Resources Manager

5. Operations Manager

6. Entrepreneur

7. Banking and Finance

Skills You’ll Need to Succeed

Communication Skills

Analytical Skills

Problem-Solving Skills

Leadership Skills

Technical Skills

How to Prepare for Your BBA Career

Choose the Right College

Get Internships

Network

Develop Soft Skills

Stay Updated

Final Thoughts

What is a BBA Anyway?

First off, let’s get the basics straight. A BBA is a bachelor’s degree that gives you a solid foundation in business management. You’ll learn about everything from marketing and finance to human resources and operations. It’s designed to equip you with the skills and knowledge needed to succeed in various business roles. Think of it as your all-access pass to the business world!

Core Areas Covered in a BBA Program

Marketing: Understanding consumer behavior, branding, advertising, and sales strategies. This is super important for promoting products and services effectively.

Understanding consumer behavior, branding, advertising, and sales strategies. This is super important for promoting products and services effectively. Finance: Learning about financial accounting, investment management, corporate finance, and financial analysis. If you love numbers, this is your jam!

Learning about financial accounting, investment management, corporate finance, and financial analysis. If you love numbers, this is your jam! Human Resources: Managing employees, recruitment, training, compensation, and ensuring a positive work environment. People skills are key here.

Managing employees, recruitment, training, compensation, and ensuring a positive work environment. People skills are key here. Operations: Focusing on optimizing business processes, supply chain management, logistics, and quality control. Making things run smoothly is the name of the game.

Focusing on optimizing business processes, supply chain management, logistics, and quality control. Making things run smoothly is the name of the game. Economics: Understanding micro and macroeconomics, market structures, and economic policies. Great for understanding the bigger picture.

Understanding micro and macroeconomics, market structures, and economic policies. Great for understanding the bigger picture. Information Technology: Learning about business information systems, data analytics, and IT management. Essential in today’s digital world.

Why Study BBA in Nepal?

Nepal is becoming a hub for business education, and a BBA degree here can be super valuable. Here’s why:

Growing Economy

Nepal’s economy is on the rise, creating a greater demand for skilled business professionals. More businesses are popping up, and they need talented people to manage and grow them. This means more job opportunities for you!

Industry Demand

Various sectors like banking, finance, tourism, and IT are booming in Nepal. These industries are constantly looking for BBA graduates to fill key roles. So, you’ll be in high demand!

Entrepreneurial Opportunities

A BBA degree equips you with the skills to start your own business. Nepal is encouraging entrepreneurship, and your BBA can give you the edge you need to succeed. Time to bring your business ideas to life!

Affordable Education

Compared to studying abroad, a BBA in Nepal is more affordable. Plus, many colleges offer scholarships and financial aid to help you out. Saving money while getting a quality education? Yes, please!

Top Career Opportunities After BBA in Nepal

Alright, let’s get to the juicy part – the career options! A BBA degree can lead to many different and exciting jobs. Here are some of the top career opportunities in Nepal:

1. Management Trainee

Management trainees are basically future leaders in a company. You’ll get to rotate through different departments, learn the ropes, and develop your management skills. It’s a fantastic way to get a broad understanding of the business. Think of it as a fast track to a management position! You might be involved in various projects, from marketing campaigns to financial analysis. The goal is to groom you for a leadership role within the organization. Strong analytical and problem-solving skills are crucial here. Being adaptable and eager to learn will also set you apart.

2. Marketing Manager

As a marketing manager , you’ll be in charge of planning and executing marketing campaigns. This includes market research, advertising, branding, and promotional activities. If you’re creative and love connecting with people, this is your dream job! You’ll need to understand what makes consumers tick and how to create compelling messages that resonate with them. Digital marketing skills are especially valuable these days. From social media campaigns to search engine optimization (SEO), knowing how to navigate the digital landscape is a huge plus. You’ll also need to be good at analyzing data to see what’s working and what’s not.

3. Financial Analyst

Financial analysts are the number crunchers of the business world. You’ll analyze financial data, prepare reports, and provide recommendations to help companies make sound financial decisions. If you have a knack for numbers and love solving puzzles, this could be your calling. Your work will involve everything from budgeting and forecasting to investment analysis. You’ll need to be proficient in financial modeling and have a strong understanding of accounting principles. Attention to detail is critical, as even small errors can have big consequences. Certifications like CFA (Chartered Financial Analyst) can give you a competitive edge.

4. Human Resources Manager

As a human resources (HR) manager , you’ll be responsible for managing a company’s employees. This includes recruitment, training, compensation, and employee relations. If you’re a people person and enjoy creating a positive work environment, this is a great fit. You’ll need to understand labor laws and be able to handle sensitive issues with diplomacy and fairness. Creating effective training programs and implementing performance management systems are also key parts of the job. Strong communication and interpersonal skills are essential for building trust and rapport with employees.

5. Operations Manager

Operations managers make sure that a company runs smoothly and efficiently. You’ll oversee production, supply chain management, and logistics. If you’re organized and love problem-solving, this is right up your alley. Your goal will be to optimize processes and reduce costs while maintaining quality. This involves everything from managing inventory to coordinating with suppliers. Strong analytical skills are needed to identify bottlenecks and implement improvements. Knowledge of lean manufacturing principles and other operational strategies can be very helpful.

6. Entrepreneur

With a BBA degree, you’ll have the skills and knowledge to start your own business. Whether it’s a tech startup, a retail store, or a consulting firm, your BBA will give you a solid foundation. Nepal is encouraging entrepreneurship, so now is a great time to take the leap. You’ll need to be able to develop a business plan, secure funding, and manage all aspects of your operation. Networking and building relationships are crucial for finding mentors and potential investors. Being resilient and adaptable is also key, as you’ll inevitably face challenges along the way.

7. Banking and Finance

Nepal’s banking and financial sector is rapidly growing, offering numerous opportunities for BBA graduates. You can work as a bank teller, loan officer, or financial advisor. These roles require strong analytical and customer service skills. Understanding financial products and regulations is also important. As you gain experience, you can move into management positions and specialize in areas like investment banking or risk management. Continuous learning and staying updated with industry trends are essential for career advancement.

Skills You’ll Need to Succeed

To really shine in any of these roles, here are some skills you should focus on developing:

See also: Blockchain Crypto: Penjelasan Lengkap Untuk Pemula

Communication Skills

Being able to communicate clearly and effectively is crucial in any business role. Whether it’s writing emails, giving presentations, or negotiating deals, strong communication skills will take you far. Practice active listening and learn how to tailor your message to different audiences. Public speaking courses and writing workshops can be very beneficial.

Analytical Skills

Businesses rely on data to make decisions, so being able to analyze data and draw meaningful insights is a must. You’ll need to be able to identify trends, solve problems, and make informed recommendations. Familiarize yourself with statistical software and data visualization tools. Taking courses in data analysis and business intelligence can give you a competitive edge.

Problem-Solving Skills

Every business faces challenges, so being able to think on your feet and find creative solutions is highly valued. Break down complex problems into smaller, manageable parts and consider different approaches. Participating in case studies and simulations can help you develop your problem-solving skills.

Leadership Skills

Even if you’re not in a management position, having leadership skills will help you influence and inspire others. Learn how to motivate teams, delegate tasks, and provide constructive feedback. Taking leadership courses and seeking out mentorship opportunities can help you develop your leadership potential.

Technical Skills

In today’s digital age, having technical skills is essential. Familiarize yourself with software like Microsoft Office, CRM systems, and project management tools. Learning programming languages like Python or R can also be a big plus, especially if you’re interested in data analysis or IT management.

How to Prepare for Your BBA Career

Okay, so you’re excited about the possibilities. What can you do now to prepare for your BBA career?

Choose the Right College

Not all BBA programs are created equal. Research different colleges and look for one that has a strong reputation, experienced faculty, and a curriculum that aligns with your interests. Visit the campus , talk to current students, and attend information sessions to get a feel for the program.

Get Internships

Internships are a fantastic way to gain real-world experience and make connections in your field. Look for internships that match your career goals and be proactive in seeking them out. Network with professionals in your industry and attend career fairs to find opportunities.

Network

Networking is all about building relationships with people in your industry. Attend industry events, join professional organizations, and connect with people on LinkedIn. Don’t be afraid to reach out to people you admire and ask for advice.

Develop Soft Skills

While technical skills are important, don’t neglect your soft skills. Focus on developing your communication, teamwork, and problem-solving abilities. Participate in extracurricular activities and volunteer work to gain experience working with others.

Stay Updated

The business world is constantly changing, so it’s important to stay updated on the latest trends and developments. Read industry publications, follow business leaders on social media, and attend webinars and conferences. Commit to lifelong learning and be open to new ideas.

Final Thoughts

A BBA degree in Nepal can be a fantastic stepping stone to a successful career. With a growing economy and increasing demand for skilled business professionals, the opportunities are endless. By choosing the right program, developing the right skills, and networking effectively, you can set yourself up for a bright future. So, go out there and make it happen! You’ve got this!
